mapper.select: SELECT COMMENT_NO, REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_WRITE_DATE, MEMBER_EMAIL FROM COMMENTS JOIN MEMBER USING (MEMBER_NO) WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo} AND COMMENT_DEL_FL = 'N' ORDER BY COMMENT_WRITE_DATE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENTS (COMMENT_NO, REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_WRITE_DATE, COMMENT_DEL_FL) VALUES ( SEQ_COMMENT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{reviewNo}, #{memberNo}, #{commentContent}, SYSDATE, 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENTS SET COMMENT_DEL_FL = 'Y', COMMENT_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo}
UPDATE COMMENTS SET COMMENT_CONTENT = #{commentContent}, COMMENT_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENTS WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo} AND COMMENT_DEL_FL = 'N'
